imageSpecs: sRGB 8-bit only. Stills 2560x1440 (16:9). Backgrounds 2560x1440. Bubbles 1200x1200. Team 800x800. Logos = transparent PNG 1400px+. Under 600 KB. Video frames: Rec.709 LIMITED (16-235) must be expanded to FULL (0-255). Never upscale. See STILLS.md.

hero.title: Countless Worlds.
hero.subtitle: We create escapist films that transport you somewhere new. Dive in and see where you can go...

about.heading: Worlds worth escaping into.
paragraphs: Rare Pond Studios is an independent film studio crafting escapist stories that feel like peering into an alternate world. We work across live-action and 2D / 3D animation, blending mediums to build immersive little "bubbles" in our pond.

Founded by writer-director Jack Carlsen, the studio is built on a simple idea: every project is a window into somewhere else. We develop, shoot, animate, and finish our films in-house, and we love collaborating with other creatives to bring ambitious worlds to life.

sectionHeadings.projectsSub: Every Rare Pond pocket universe in one place. Hover to peek, click to dive in.
sectionHeadings.teamSub: The people building these little universes.
sectionHeadings.contactSub: Tell us about your project and we'll be in touch.

teamCrew.blurb: Hiring us to crew your shoot? We can fold a basic gear package into our day rate. The exact kit depends on which department you bring us in for.
